name: New Concept Energy, Inc.
business: New Concept Energy, Inc. owns approximately 190 acres of land in Parkersburg, West Virginia, with four structures totaling about 53,000 square feet, and leases a portion of the main building for $103,000 per annum. The company provides advisory and management services to an independent West Virginia oil and gas company under a consulting agreement, receiving 10% of the revenue from oil and gas wells.

exposures.sentence: The Company provides advisory and management services to an independent West Virginia oil and gas company
Of this total area the main industrial / office building contains approximately 24,800 square feet of which as of December 31, 2025 approximately 16,000 square feet is leased for $103,000 per annum.
